concerns.text: Template/sample tasks comment block states 'The /speckit-tasks command MUST replace these with actual tasks' - indicates tasks file was not properly generated and contains placeholder content instead of real implementation tasks
T001 'Create project structure per implementation plan' lacks concrete deliverable - what specific directories/files define 'complete'? No verification criteria named
T003 'Configure linting and formatting tools' has no verification - how is completion confirmed? (lint pass? config file exists?)
T006 'Setup logging infrastructure' lacks verification criteria - what output confirms logging is configured correctly?
T008 'Configure environment variables' has no verification - what file/content confirms completion?
T009 'Implement power analysis utility' lacks output format specification - what artifact confirms FR-015 compliance? (JSON report? console output?)
T013 'Implement EMP/MG-RAST data download' lacks specific URLs - implementer cannot execute without knowing exact dataset endpoints
T015 'Implement variable verification per FR-008' lacks output format - where/how are [MISSING_VARIABLE] markers recorded?
T018 'Implement rarefaction using QIIME 2' lacks version specification - which QIIME 2 version? What exact command parameters?
T025 'Implement beta regression or binomial GLMM' lacks model specification - what fixed/random effects formula? What convergence criteria?
T028 'Implement multiple-comparison correction' has unclear verification - '≥100% correction coverage tracking' is not a concrete deliverable
T030 'Implement associational framing' is not testable - how is 'framing' verified in code? (output text? docstring?)
T033 'Implement correlation coefficient measurement against published meta-analysis values' lacks reference values - what meta-analysis values to compare against?
T037 'Implement ANCOM differential abundance testing' lacks parameters - what ANCOM version? What significance threshold beyond q<0.1?
T038 'Implement co-occurrence network using CoNet' lacks version/specification - which CoNet version? What network parameters?
T044 'Documentation updates in docs/ including quickstart.md validation' is too coarse - what specific documentation? What validation criteria?
T045 'Code cleanup and refactoring across all analysis modules' is not actionable - no concrete deliverable or verification criteria
T046 'Performance optimization... ensure ≤6 hour runtime' lacks verification method - how is runtime measured and confirmed?
T047 'Additional unit tests in code/tests/unit/' is too vague - what specific tests? What coverage target?
T048 'Implement Docker containerization' lacks base image specification - what base image? What exact packages to include?
T049 'Run quickstart.md validation' lacks validation criteria - what defines 'all tasks execute end-to-end' success?
